summary: Frontend-only regression on mobile viewport 390x844 after keyboard handling refactor (TouchableWithoutFeedback removed). All 6 requested flows PASS. Text input typing now works correctly on mobile preview - both fill() and keyboard.type() reliably set the value. Ask flow navigates to /result and Gemini-backed result-card + disclaimer-banner render. Language toggle switches 'Pahadi Pharma' -> 'पहाड़ी फार्मा'. Camera modal opens with all 3 options. TextInput receives focus on tap and accepts typed input.

react_native_issues.issue: expo-av deprecated in SDK 54 - console warnings on load (non-blocking). Plan migration to expo-audio/expo-video.

action_items: Optional only: migrate expo-av -> expo-audio to silence SDK 54 deprecation warnings
critical_code_review_comments: KeyboardAvoidingView + ScrollView(keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled', keyboardDismissMode='on-drag') is correctly configured in app/index.tsx.
TextInput has onFocus -> scrollRef.scrollToEnd with 300ms delay; focus verified working on web preview.
api.ts reads EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from env (good, no hardcoding).
seed_data_creation: None - tests did not create persistent data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Typing bug is RESOLVED. Verified text-input accepts both playwright fill() and keyboard.type() on 390x844 viewport, value reads back correctly, and TextInput is focusable. Full ask->result flow end-to-end is green against live Gemini backend (paracetamol tablet -> valid JSON response rendered as result-card with disclaimer-banner). Language toggle, camera modal, and keyboard focus all confirmed working. Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env for any API tests.
rca_of_issue: Previous typing failure was caused by TouchableWithoutFeedback wrapper intercepting taps on mobile web. Fix (removing the wrapper and relying on ScrollView's keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled') is validated: TextInput now becomes document.activeElement on tap and onChangeText fires correctly.
